product_data.Features: 16-inch Liquid Retina XDR display, Apple M3 Pro chip, 18GB unified memory, 512GB SSD, 22-hour battery life, MagSafe 3 charging, Thunderbolt 4 ports

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message:
Hello,

I hope this message finds you well. I came across your listing for the Apple MacBook Pro 16-inch (M3 Pro) and I must say, I'm very interested in it. I was wondering if there is any room for negotiation on the price? 

Looking forward to hearing from you. Thank you!

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Could you offer me the Apple MacBook Pro 16-inch (M3 Pro) at a price within my budget of $1800.00?

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I appreciate your offer, but unfortunately, it exceeds my budget. I cannot afford it at that price. Thank you.
